ご主人様、どうされました？<br>先日から事務作業のパフォーマンスが３０％ほど低:
Master, what is the matter? Your clerical performance has dropped
by about 30% in recent days.
肩こり、ですか。なるほど、首や肩周りの筋肉の緊張と血行不良により<br>肩関節に:
Stiff shoulders, I see. Tension in your neck and shoulder muscles and
poor blood circulation causes a shoulder joint malfunction.
そういうことでしたらエレクトラにお任せください。<br>低周波パルスによる治療を:
If that is the case, please leave it to Electra. I will administer a
low-frequency pulse treatment.
ご安心ください。以前アーデルハイトさんに行い大変好評でしたので。<br>それでは:
Please rest assured. I performed this treatment on Adelheid
previously, and it was well-received. Now then, I shall begin. 3, 2, 1. Fire.
床に転がり細かく震えて……喜んでいただけたようですね。<br>アーデルハイトさん:
You writhed on the floor, trembling finely, evidently pleased.
Adelheid also said it was the best stimulation she'd ever had.
